Localization.Description: A user performed an action with a time frame

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed time frame "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed time frame "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created time frame "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
